data.name: Housemates
data.detailed_description:
Housemates is a daily life simulation game. A lust virus has hit the world! Play as a college student stuck inside with his landlady and housemate. Talk to them, get to know them, and importantly, 'help them out' with the lust virus!

FEATURES

  • A story about being stuck at home!

  • Has 2 mature ladies to romance!

  • Over 70 hand drawn, frame by frame animated scenes!

GAMEPLAY

  • Explore the house!

  • Talk to the ladies!

  • Help them with massages!

  • Dice rolls!

  • Make some love!

  • More dice rolls!

data.short_description: Housemates is a daily life simulation game. A lust virus has hit the country! Play as a college student stuck inside with his landlady and housemate. Talk to them, get to know them, and importantly, 'help them out' with the lust virus!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher.
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
